title: Professional Relationships, Community Participation, and Consent · Claim Audit: Network Map
summary: A learner treats networking as mass cold requests for referrals, extracts attention, ignores community norms, and measures people only by hiring power. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the network map increment in reciprocal relationship practice plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Map existing reciprocal relationships across work, study, community, identity-safe spaces, events, and weak ties without ranking human worth.
Pause, preserve non-sensitive evidence, verify, refuse, report through appropriate channels, secure affected accounts, and document uncertainty after suspicious contact.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Network Map · Theory Network Map
steps.instruction:
theory case — Automated messages ask strangers for referrals, ignore community norms and stop signals, and measure every relationship by immediate hiring access. The theory variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Network Map contract for the supplied data.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Automated messages ask strangers for referrals, ignore community norms and stop signals, and measure every relationship by immediate hiring access. The worked example variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Map existing reciprocal relationships across work, study, community, identity-safe spaces, events, and weak ties without ranking human worth. A defensible solution applies Network Map, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to reciprocal relationship practice plan.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-network-map — Map existing reciprocal relationships across work, study, community, identity-safe spaces, events, and weak ties without ranking human worth.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-5
focus: career-network-map
decision-evidence: Map existing reciprocal relationships across work, study, community, identity-safe spaces, events, and weak ties without ranking human worth.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.text: People without industry contacts have no professional network. This fails the Network Map contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Map existing reciprocal relationships across work, study, community, identity-safe spaces, events, and weak ties without ranking human worth.
